## Checklist
- [ ] Tests were written first (the `red-proof` check proves it)
- [ ] Every claimed acceptance criterion is covered by a test
- [ ] Changes stay within this task's scope
- [ ] Role separation respected (Coder didn't touch `tests/**`; Test Engineer didn't touch `src/**`)
- [ ] ADRs added for any significant or dependency-adding decision
